Describe the sequence of text overlays and objects shown during the introduction.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the title HOW TO MAKE GRINCH KABOBS displays over fruit kabobs; at 6s, text changes to Let's Get Started; at 8s, a package of skewers appears beside the fruit; at 10s, close-ups of bamboo stick packages begin on a dark surface.

What does the person do with the sliced banana pieces?
canonical_answer: The person threads the banana slices onto wooden skewers with grapes and strawberries.
